charter: Derive and execute the next VISION-aligned tusq.dev increment after M23. First reconcile the baseline by marking the shipped M23 strict policy verifier complete in planning artifacts if repo evidence supports it. Then have PM derive a concrete M24 increment from .planning/VISION.md and current product gaps, favoring V1 data/schema understanding or validator-aware input-schema inference for existing Node.js route discovery if feasible. Keep work inside AgentXchain roles and require concrete code, tests, docs, QA evidence, and launch artifact updates.
acceptance_contract: M23 shipped status is reconciled in planning artifacts before new scope is planned
PM derives a bounded M24 increment from VISION.md and current product gaps
Implementation produces real code/tests/docs through AgentXchain
QA independently verifies behavior and artifacts before launch
